title: AI SMASHES Benchmarks! Fable 5.5 LEAVES Codex in Dust! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof reports that Fable 5.0 and GPT 5.5 achieve breakthrough benchmark performance, exceeding competitors in agentic coding and knowledge tasks. The video frames this as evidence that the future of AI capability has arrived.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof reports that Fable 5.0 and GPT 5.5 post breakthrough benchmark results, surpassing competitors on agentic coding and knowledge tasks. The framing positions these scores as evidence that a new tier of AI capability has arrived. The takeaway centers on benchmark leadership in agentic systems, with the two models cited as outperforming rivals.
